concept: 협상 붕괴 충격 — 이란 거부 순간
image_prompt: A dramatic aerial view of the Strait of Hormuz at dusk, with dark storm clouds gathering over the narrow waterway. An Iranian military vessel in the foreground with a red warning light. The water reflects an ominous orange-red glow from the setting sun, symbolizing geopolitical tension. The scene conveys the sense of a critical crossroads in global energy security. Photorealistic, cinematic lighting, high detail. The bottom 40% of the image is pure solid black (#000000), completely empty with no elements.

A split composition showing two contrasting futures: on the left, a gas station price board showing a high fuel price above 2,500 KRW per liter under a stormy dark sky with red-tinted clouds; on the right, the same gas station with a lower price around 1,700 KRW per liter under a clearer sky with hints of blue. The dividing line runs sharply down the center. Photorealistic, dramatic contrast lighting. The bottom 40% of the image is pure solid black (#000000), completely empty with no elements.

concept: 반도체 역설 — 전쟁 속 SK하이닉스 급등
image_prompt: A close-up photorealistic image of a gleaming HBM (High Bandwidth Memory) chip on a dark reflective surface, with a subtle upward green arrow overlaid digitally. In the blurred background, a news ticker showing war headlines contrasts with the chip's pristine silver-gold sheen. Studio lighting with a strong upward beam highlighting the chip, symbolizing growth against a turbulent backdrop. The bottom 40% of the image is pure solid black (#000000), completely empty with no elements.
